error.cors:
Error: Local Environment Setup Required
To run this application locally on web, please use the following command:
flutter run -d chrome --web-browser-flag "--disable-web-security"
This step is necessary to bypass CORS restrictions during local development. Please note that this flag should only be used in a development environment and never in production.

demo.sign_in_required_body: Create a free account to start tracking your personal investments.

how_it_works.title: How InvestTrack Works
how_it_works.step1_body: Enter the ticker symbol, quantity, and purchase date for each position you hold.
how_it_works.step2_body: We fetch real-time prices and automatically calculate your total gain or loss.
how_it_works.step3_body: Your portfolio is personal - a free account keeps your data private and synced across devices.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro_body: Welcome to the InvestTrack mobile application. This Privacy Policy outlines our practices regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of information that we receive through our app. Our primary goal is to provide you with a convenient tool while respecting your privacy.
privacy_policy.collect_intro: We collect the following personal data when you use the app:
privacy_policy.collect_user_id_prefix: - User ID: A unique identifier generated by
privacy_policy.collect_user_id_suffix: to associate your account with your data.
privacy_policy.collect_investments: - Investments: Content of your personal investment records are stored in our backend database.
privacy_policy.storage_prefix: Your investment records and related data are securely stored in
privacy_policy.storage_suffix: , a widely used, industry-standard serverless SQL database. Vercel Postgres is known for its robust security features, and we use it to ensure your data is stored safely.
privacy_policy.storage_deletion_prefix: Additionally, you can delete your data anytime through the app or by visiting our
privacy_policy.storage_deletion_suffix: page for detailed steps on how to delete your account and all associated data.
privacy_policy.sharing_intro: We do not share or sell your personal data to any third parties except in the following circumstances:
privacy_policy.sharing_law: - When required by law or to comply with legal processes.
privacy_policy.sharing_protection: - When necessary to protect the rights, safety, and property of our company or other users.
privacy_policy.rights_intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy_policy.rights_access: - Access: You can request access to the personal data we store about you.
privacy_policy.rights_deletion: - Deletion: You can request that we delete your personal data.
privacy_policy.rights_modification: - Modification: You can request corrections or updates to your personal data if it is inaccurate.
privacy_policy.changes_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will notify you through the app or by other means so you can review the updated policy before continuing to use the app.
privacy_policy.contact_intro: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, feel free to contact us at:
privacy_policy.error_copy_link: You can copy this link and paste it into your browser:
